titleStmt.title: SII 34.188: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 188. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock below the Chōḷēśvara shrine in front of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 22nd year = A.D. 1034.
This records a sale of land to the temple on the Tiruvāṭpōkki-malai hill by the ūrār of Kāruṅgālippaḷḷi in Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu. The sale deed was written by a local Veḷḷāḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭa m poṟce
miṉtiraṉṉāramum tenticai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum ṭak kēraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulata
palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatir vēlait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻaṉtīvum ceruvi
l Irupattorukālattaraicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mēvaruñcāntimattīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟti
yum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭu Oḷita jayaciṅka naḷapperum pukaḻōṭu pīṭiyal Iraṭṭapa
ḻ Arai Ilakkamu navanatikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkarama vīra cakkarakōṭṭamum mutirpaṭavalai maturamaṇṭa
miṭa vaḷa ṉāmaṇakkōṇaiyum vemcilai vīrar pañcay paḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉa mācuṇi tēycamu
vaṇkīrtti Ātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulat tiṉtirataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup pala
niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimuṉai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcuracērnalk kōcalai nāṭum taṉma
l muṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicōlait taṇṭakuttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇṇuka tākki tikkanai kīrtti ta
m kōvintacantaṉ māviḻintōṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tēycamum toṭukaṭac caṅkoṭṭa
ḷaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷa Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅ
lāṭamum veṟimalar tīrttat teṟipuṉalk kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuviṟ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavi
kapaṉmaṉāṉa kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭal kumpakkariyōṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyil
piṟakkamum ka nakar pōrttoḻil vācalil viccātira tōraṇamum moyttoḷi puṉai maṇi pu
katavamum niṟaicēr vicaiyammum tuṟai nīrpaṉmaiyum maṉmalaiyūril toṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭal
kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācōkamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamu
lampuricai mē kamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum
kōlamum viṉaimā tamaliṅmu kalāmuri kaṭuntiṟa lilāmu
tēnakkavār poḻil vāṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramu
ntaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakēcaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājēntracōḻa
yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Āvatu kēraḷāntakavaḷaṉāṭṭu mīkōṭṭu nāṭṭu ka
Ivvūr ṉīr nilattil mēlaiy caṅkara nārāyaṇapperuñceyil naṭuvil vāṉavaṉ caṅka na
pataṉ tenku nāṟṟaṅkālaiyum tiruvāṭpōkkimalaiy Uṭaiyār caṇḍayśvaradevarkku viṟṟukkuṭut
nāṉkellaiy caṅkaraṉāṇa peruñceyk kīḻaiya varavaikku mēṟkku tenpāṟkellaiy koḷka nnīraṟṟa vākālukku
kellaiy caṅkaranāṇapperuñcey mēlaya varavaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellaiy kuḻittaṇṭalaiy nilam kōtaiperuñcekku
catta peruṉānkellai Uḷppaṭṭa nila yu marutan piriyaṉāṅkālukku Itaṉ Ellaiy kīḻpāṟkellai ca
ce cey tenvāy nāṟṟaṅkālin kīḻaiy nāṟṟaṅkālukku mēṟkum tenpāṟkellaiy pāli cāttaṉ peruñceykku vaṭakku
laiy tirik kīḻḻait tuṭavaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellaiy caṅkaranāraṇa ruñ ceykku teṟkkum Ivvicainta perunāṉ kellai
malaiyum mākāṇiyum Ākanmayum Inṉilam munṟumākkāṇikkum Emmillicainta vilaipporuḷ tiruvāṭpOkkiy
māhādevar ṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastatāl koṇṭa kāycu 8 10 Ikkācu Eṇpatukkum vilaikku viṟṟu poruḷaṟak
koṇṭu Ituvēy porumā Aṟutiyp poruṭ cilavōlaiyāvitākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu poruṭ cilavu kāṭṭak kaṭavara
llārākavum Iṉ nilam mūnṟumākkāṇiyum Iṟai Iṟuttuk ka viṭṭuviṭṭōmākavum Innilam mūnṟumākkāṇiyum
ṟṟukkuṭuttu Ikkācu Eṇpatum pēṟakkāṇavum śaṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastattu kāruṅkālippaḷḷi Ūṟark
m Ivvūrār colla Inṉilam vilaiyāvaṇa vōlai Eḻutinēṉ Ivvūr veḷḷāḷa cun=ti mayēn Ivai Enṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
